channel.title: Modern Investing Techniques
channel.description: Daily investing podcast using AI-driven analysis and modern tools to identify market opportunities, track simulated trades, and teach strategies that aim to outperform index funds. Covering Canadian and US markets with actionable picks, performance tracking, and lessons learned.
channel.itunes:author: Modern Investing Techniques

item.title: Ep 1: Modern Investing Techniques — Premiere Episode
item.description:
Welcome to Modern Investing Techniques — your daily AI-powered market intelligence podcast. In this premiere episode, we cover the latest market movements, introduce our Practice Investment tracking system, and break down strategies for Canadian and US investors using TFSA, RRSP, and FHSA accounts.
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary: Welcome to Modern Investing Techniques — your daily AI-powered market intelligence podcast. Premiere episode covering market movements, Practice Investment tracking, and strategies for Canadian and US investors.
item.itunes:title: Ep 1: Modern Investing Techniques — Premiere Episode
